mentions.snippet: BMW M5 Forum thread "King Main Bearings Defective": multiple users found King thrust bearings over 1mm too narrow to fit BMW S85/S65 blocks.
Buyer received a King SI main bearing that was malformed in production, crushed and twisted about 1/8" out of size.
Diesel Truck Forum thread titled "WARNING about King Main Thrust Bearings", a buyer-warning thread about a recurring problem pattern.
460 Ford Forum thread "King Bearing Failures?" discussing reported bearing failures in Ford 460 engine builds.
RacingJunk Forums thread on a quality control problem with King bearings and a lack of professional support in resolving it.
